findings.finding: Credential recovery permitted cross-purpose reuse of previous password or recovery material.
findings.fix: Runtime v2 rejects either previous verifier matching either new credential purpose.

findings.finding: Process-local tenants, accounts, memberships, invites, sessions, verifier records and audit events were unbounded.
findings.fix: Runtime v2 introduces validated hard limits, atomic capacity preflight, per-account active-session caps and pruning of expired or revoked sessions before issue.
